def positive_python_perf_layer_serialization_pydantic_model_recreated_for_internal_dict():
    rule_id = "python_perf_layer_serialization_pydantic_model_recreated_for_internal_dict"
    family = "performance"
    severity = "contextual"
    status = "stable"
    intent = "captures the smell described by this rule"
    description = "Layer: Serialization and deserialization. Flag Pydantic model construction around trusted internal dicts in tight loops."
    return rule_id, family, severity, status, intent, description
